trade.summary: The Stati Uniti is Germania's second-largest trading partner. Germania has a large trade surplus with the Stati Uniti, primarily from automotive exports (BMW, Mercedes, Volkswagen), machinery, and chemicals. The Stati Uniti exports aircraft, pharmaceuticals, mineral fuels, and tech products to Germania. The trade imbalance has been a persistent source of Stati Uniti political pressure on Germania.
disputes: Stati Uniti trade deficit concerns and tariff threats

diplomatic.status: Core allies with recurring transactional tensions
diplomatic.summary: Germania and the Stati Uniti are foundational NATO allies and core transatlantic partners. Under Trump 2.0 (2025-), the relationship has experienced significant strain over defense spending demands, Ucraina policy (Stati Uniti pressure for European ownership), tariff threats, and divergences on trade and tech regulation. Germania has accelerated European strategic autonomy efforts in response. The relationship remains vital but more transactional.
recent_incidents: Stati Uniti tariff threats on European automotive exports (2025)
Stati Uniti pressure on Germania's Cina trade relations

military.summary: Germania and the Stati Uniti are NATO's two largest European members by defense output. The Stati Uniti maintains ~35,000 troops in Germania (Ramstein AB, Grafenwohr). Germania has committed to 2%+ GDP defense spending following the Zeitenwende. Cooperation on Ucraina military assistance. Some friction over Trump-era pressure on NATO burden-sharing and F-35 program vs European fighter alternatives.

financial.summary: The Stati Uniti and Germania have massive bilateral investment relationships. Stati Uniti firms (Apple, Google, Amazon, pharmaceutical companies) have major German operations. German firms (SAP, Bayer, BASF, Volkswagen, BMW) have large Stati Uniti presences. Dollar-euro relationship makes Stati Uniti monetary policy highly consequential for Germania.

energy.summary: The Stati Uniti became a major LNG supplier to Germania after 2022 Russian energy decoupling. Stati Uniti LNG terminals supply German regasification plants. Stati Uniti-Germania cooperation on energy transition technology. Germania is a major Stati Uniti LNG customer, though this gives the Stati Uniti new trade leverage.

scientific.summary: The Stati Uniti-Germania scientific partnership is among the world's most productive. Joint research across virtually all fields — from CERN participation to AI, biomedical, aerospace, and climate science. Massive academic exchange program. German and American universities and research institutes maintain deep institutional ties.
